title: titanotrichum oldhamii
intro: Titanotrichum oldhamii, also known as the Tibetan ironflower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Staphidiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Titanotrichum oldhamii include its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. The herbal preparations of Titanotrichum oldhamii include teas and infusions made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to make medicinal remedies.
